zh.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷可特 在 馮 波斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall於1480年出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，她的父親Thomas Legh29歲，母親Katherine Savage22歲。她於1500年與Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年在她的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷可特 在 馮 波斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall于1480年出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲Thomas Legh29岁，母亲Katherine Savage22岁。她于1500年与Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年在她的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall was born in 1480, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas Legh, was 29 and her mother, Katherine Savage, was 22. She married Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton in 1500, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1522, in her hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall est née en 1480, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Legh, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Katherine Savage, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton en 1500, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1522, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall 1480 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Legh 29 und ihre Mutter Katherine Savage 22. Sie hat 1500 in Derbyshire, England Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall è nata il nel 1480 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Legh, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Katherine Savage, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton nel 1500, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1522, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ko.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이컷 인 테 무르스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall(이)가 1480년 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Legh(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Savage(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 더비실르에서 Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall nasceu em 1480, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Legh, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Savage, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton em 1500, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1522, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: дреикотт ин т мурс, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall родилась в 1480 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Legh было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Savage, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton в 1500 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1522 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.
